summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about the problems with technology controlling education. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving only as a pointer to the full article published on Bloomberg. O'Neil uses her blog to cross-promote her mainstream media writing.
key_points: Post announces a new Bloomberg View column on tech in education
No substantive content is provided in the blog post itself
Links to both the specific column and her full Bloomberg archive
key_insight: This announcement post contains no analyzable argument; the substantive content exists only in the linked Bloomberg column.
